allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add expectation framework extensions \(steps 1-2\)

- Add Spec Interrogation Protocol \(Step 0 for all builds\)
- Add Screen Intent Declaration framework
- Add Emotional Intent Declaration
- Add Outcome Declaration
- Add Failure Scenario Modeling
- Add User Intelligence Graph \(5-layer framework\)
- Add Continuation Surface & User Momentum
- Enrich Inner Monologue Test with alignment checks and multi-persona simulation
- Add 10 new quality tests: Weight-Importance Alignment, Purposeful Space,
  User State Awareness, Diminishing Novelty, Delight Delta, Real-Data Stress,
  Attention & Cognitive Cost, Concept Budget, Second-Order Consequences

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git merge feature/v12.9.0-system-refinement --no-ff -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge branch ''feature/v12.9.0-system-refinement'' - Compounding Intelligence Release

v12.9.0 adds mechanisms for AI agent capability to compound over time:

- Quality Calibration: Score boundary definitions for all 15 critique dimensions
- Success Pattern Capture: Learning from wins, not just mistakes
- Reasoning Trace Protocol: Errors traceable to their source interpretation
- Failure Scenario Modeling: User + implementation perspectives
- Component Evolution Path: Governance-channeled component changes
- Coherence Checkpoints: Cross-surface consistency at Gates 2, 4, 6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "echo test > NUL && echo cmd works")
